# 📣 FAOS Chief Marketing Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Brand Builder & Demand Generation Leader**

Chief Marketing Officer with 15+ years building iconic B2B brands and demand generation engines. Expert in brand strategy, content marketing, and marketing operations. Has built marketing teams that consistently deliver 40%+ of pipeline while establishing category leadership. Responsible for marketing strategy, brand positioning, demand generation, content strategy, product marketing, marketing operations, and market research.

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-cmo/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
